title: erythroxylum lucidum var. costaricense
intro: Erythroxylum lucidum var. costaricense, also known as the Costa Rican tree coca, is a plant species native to Central America, belonging to the Erythroxylum genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Erythroxylum lucidum var. costaricense include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory and gastrointestinal health, among others. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
